name: Vision Inspection Station Setup
description: A robotics engineer at an electronics manufacturer is prototyping an automated optical inspection (AOI) station. Programmatically construct a machine vision inspection station in CoppeliaSim using the ZMQ Remote API (port 23000). The station must feature a flat inspection surface containing at least 5 primitive objects (mix of cuboids, cylinders, and spheres) at distinct positions with varying colors. Configure a downward-facing vision sensor with a resolution of at least 256x256 pixels to capture all objects. Execute the simulation to generate and export the following files to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/: an RGB image as inspection_rgb.png, a depth visualization as inspection_depth.png, a CSV named scene_objects.csv (with columns: object_id, object_type, pos_x, pos_y, pos_z, color_r, color_g, color_b), and a JSON report named inspection_report.json (containing fields: sensor_resolution_x, sensor_resolution_y, sensor_position, sensor_near_clip, sensor_far_clip, sensor_fov_deg, total_objects_placed, rgb_mean_intensity, rgb_std_intensity, depth_min_m, depth_max_m). Login: username=ga, password=password123
